title: Interactive Staff-Level Systems Curriculum
description: A curriculum-as-code playground for learning computer science and systems engineering through concept chapters, scaffolded exercises, validation, and Staff-level review.

tracks.title: Go Concurrency Gauntlet
tracks.description: Goroutines, channels, cancellation, backpressure, race freedom, and leak-free services.

tracks.title: Tooling Foundations
tracks.description: Unix pipelines, Git internals, shell execution, and editor/tool fluency.

tracks.title: Operating Systems and Kernel Labs
tracks.description: Syscalls, memory, scheduling, and kernel boundary reasoning.

tracks.title: Deep Networking
tracks.description: Reliable transport, packet forwarding, routing, NAT, and network failure behavior.

tracks.title: Database Systems Staff Lab
tracks.description: WAL, pages, buffer pools, B+ trees, recovery, transactions, and query execution.

tracks.title: Distributed Systems Staff Lab
tracks.description: Failure models, replicated logs, Raft, sharding, queues, and simulation.

tracks.title: Systems Programming
tracks.description: Processes, memory allocators, event loops, protocol parsing, and local service internals.

tracks.title: Security Engineering
tracks.description: Threat modeling, auth, secrets, supply-chain security, sandboxing, and agent security.

tracks.title: Performance Engineering
tracks.description: Profiling, tail latency, contention, benchmark design, and overload control.

tracks.title: Containers and Kubernetes
tracks.description: Namespaces, cgroups, OCI images, controllers, operators, admission, and scheduling.

tracks.title: PostgreSQL Administration
tracks.description: Backups, PITR, replication, failover, tuning, vacuum, and operational runbooks.

tracks.title: ML Systems
tracks.description: Autograd, training loops, checkpointing, inference serving, feature stores, and model registries.

tracks.title: LLM Application Engineering
tracks.description: Prompt registries, structured outputs, evals, traces, model routing, approvals, and cost controls.

tracks.title: AI, RAG, and Agents
tracks.description: RAG, GraphRAG, retrieval evals, agent runtimes, MCP tools, guardrails, and sandboxing.

tracks.title: Build Systems and Developer Platforms
tracks.description: Task graphs, caching, hermeticity, remote execution, CI orchestration, and internal platforms.

tracks.title: Networking
tracks.description: HTTP, DNS, proxies, load balancers, service discovery, and connection behavior.

tracks.title: System Design and SRE
tracks.description: API gateways, observability, SLOs, rollouts, feature flags, and incident response.
